description: Full record for a single dbt node, enriched with lineage and column-level lineage slices.  Per-resource-type payload sub-dicts (metric, exposure, semantic_model, …) are additionalProperties so future resource types never fail validation.

$schema.description: Relative path to this document's JSON Schema.

columnLineage.description: Slice of the upstream column-level lineage map for this node. Keys are 'unique_id.column_name'; values list upstream column references.

column_referenced_by.description: Slice of the downstream column-level lineage map for this node. Keys are 'unique_id.column_name'; values list downstream column references (columns in other nodes that derive from this node's columns).

columns.description: Column records for physical nodes (model/source/seed/snapshot). Absent or empty for non-physical types.

tests.description: dbt data-test types defined for this column (not_null, unique, accepted_values, …).

database.description: Warehouse database.  Empty string for typeless resources (metrics, exposures, …) that have no physical location.

depends_on.description: List of unique_ids this node depends on (upstream parents). Derived from the lineage graph — not re-stored in the SPA payload.

materialization.description: dbt materialization strategy (view, table, incremental, …). Empty string for non-physical resource types.

meta.description: Arbitrary user-defined meta dict from YAML.

referenced_by.description: List of unique_ids that depend on this node (downstream children). Derived from the lineage graph — not re-stored in the SPA payload.

resource_type.description: dbt resource type (model, source, seed, snapshot, analysis, operation, metric, semantic_model, saved_query, unit_test, exposure).

schema.description: Warehouse schema.  Empty string for typeless resources.

tags.description: List of YAML tags applied to this node.

title: dbdocs api/v1/nodes/<id>.json
